Night, Toilet, Lake, Moon, Trees The image is a black and white photograph of a night sky with a full moon in the background. The sky is filled with dark clouds and the moon is partially visible in the top right corner. In the foreground, there is a body of water with ripples on the surface. On the left side of the image, there are several trees silhouetted against the sky. The trees are tall and slender, with bare branches reaching up towards the moon. The water is calm and still, reflecting the trees and the sky above. The image is taken from a low angle, creating a sense of depth and perspective.
